summary: WIN-001 Snyder (1987) citation upgraded from bare in-text reference to a linked USGS Prof. Paper 1395 citation: https://pubs.usgs.gov/pp/1395/ (Map Projections — A Working Manual, pp. 182-190 — Chapter 25 Azimuthal Equidistant Projection). Brings the citation depth into parity with the same Snyder reference elsewhere in our review (WIN-058-theta-rule preempting-consistency-test paragraph already uses the linked-citation format). Patch PATCH-304-C in EXP-304.
